item.title: 曝 Intel CPU 全线涨价 10%，笔记本电脑零售价或涨近四成
item.guid: 曝-Intel-CPU-全线涨价-10%，笔记本电脑零售价或涨近四成
item.description:
According to Korean media ETNews, Intel has notified its major customers this month that it plans to increase the prices of all its PC CPUs by 10% starting from the end of this month, covering most of its mainstream product lines, from entry-level to high-end flagship processors. 据韩媒 ETNews 报道，英特尔已于本月通知主要客户，计划从本月底起对旗下 PC 用 CPU 全线涨价 10%，涵盖其绝大多数主流产品线，从入门级到高端旗舰处理器均在涨价范围之内。

The direct background for this price increase is that AI demand is accelerating its evolution towards the inference stage. Given limited production capacity, Intel has chosen to prioritize its more profitable data center business, leading to a tightening supply of consumer-grade CPUs. 此次涨价的直接背景是 AI 需求正加速向推理阶段演进。在产能有限的前提下，英特尔选择优先保障利润更高的数据中心业务，导致消费级 CPU 供应趋于紧张。

Currently, Intel holds approximately 70% of the computer CPU market share, far surpassing AMD and Qualcomm, and its pricing strategy has a pivotal impact on the entire industry. 目前，英特尔在电脑 CPU 市场占据约 70% 的份额，远超 AMD 和高通，其定价策略对整个行业具有举足轻重的影响。

TrendForce previously predicted that if memory and CPU prices rise simultaneously, these two core components could account for up to 58% of the material cost in laptop computers; a memory price increase alone could push the retail price of ordinary laptops up by over 30%, and with the additional CPU price increase, the total retail price increase for end-users could approach 40%. TrendForce 集邦咨询曾预测，若内存与 CPU 价格同步上涨，这两项核心部件在笔记本电脑物料成本中的占比最高可达 58%；仅内存涨价一项，就可能推动普通笔记本零售价上涨逾 30%，叠加 CPU 涨价后，终端零售总涨幅或将接近 40%。

item.title: 小米汽车回应「为何不公布大定数字」
item.guid: 小米汽车回应「为何不公布大定数字」
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi Auto released the latest installment of "Xiaomi Auto Answers Netizens' Questions" and responded to the question, "Why were the 'big order' numbers not disclosed on the night the new generation SU7 was launched?" 昨天，小米汽车发布最新一期「小米汽车答网友问」，并回复了「为什么新一代 SU7 发布当晚，没有披露大定数字？」这一问题。

Xiaomi stated that the new generation SU7's "locked order" progress has been better than the first generation since its launch. It is reported that starting from the day after the YU7 was released in June last year, Xiaomi chose to announce "locked order" volumes instead of "big order" volumes. 小米方面表示，新一代 SU7，从开售到现在，「锁单」进展一直比第一代更好。据悉，从去年 6 月 YU7 发布后的第二天开始，小米就选择了公布「锁单」量，而非「大定」量。

Xiaomi emphasized that non-refundable "locked order" data can more truly and objectively reflect users' choices and recognition; it highly focuses on the continuous improvement and optimization of the user purchase experience, ensuring that locked order car owners can pick up their cars earlier. 小米强调，因为不可退的「锁单」数据更能真实、客观地反映用户的选择与认可；其高度关注用户购买体验的持续改善和优化，确保让锁单车主更早提车。

item.title: 库克：Mac 迎来了史上最佳首销周
item.guid: 库克：Mac-迎来了史上最佳首销周
item.description:
Last night, Apple CEO Tim Cook posted that Mac had achieved its best-ever first-week sales record, and he also stated that a large number of users were using Mac for the first time. 昨晚，苹果 CEO 库克（Tim Cook）发文称，Mac 迎来了史上最好的首销周纪录，并且其还表示有大量用户首次使用 Mac。

Although no specific model was mentioned in the article, based on foreign media reports and related product release speculations, Apple's first-week sales performance this time may be mainly attributed to the newly released entry-level laptop, the MacBook Neo. 虽文内未提及具体机型，但按照外媒及相关产品发布推测来看，苹果本次首销周成绩或主要归功于新发布的入门级笔记本 MacBook Neo。

It is reported that the MacBook Neo was released this month, with an official starting price of 4599 yuan. In the Chinese mainland market, with educational discounts and subsidies, the price can be as low as 3399 yuan. 据悉，MacBook Neo 于本月发售，官方起售价为 4599 元，中国大陆市场教育优惠叠加补贴最低可达 3399 元起。

The MacBook Neo is also Apple's first entry-level laptop, equipped with an A18 Pro processor and featuring multiple new color options. 而 MacBook Neo 也为苹果首款入门级笔记本电脑，搭载 A18 Pro 处理器，并且采用多款全新配色。

Additionally, Apple recently updated the M5 series models of MacBook Air and MacBook Pro. 另外，苹果还在近期更新了 MacBook Air、MacBook Pro 的 M5 系列机型。

item.title: 华为云 CEO 周跃峰：下半年将推出一系列「龙虾」产品
item.guid: 华为云-CEO-周跃峰：下半年将推出一系列「龙虾」产品
item.description:
At yesterday's Huawei China Partner Conference 2026, Zhou Yuefeng, Huawei Senior Vice President and CEO of Huawei Cloud, revealed that Huawei Cloud will launch more industry-specific intelligent agents this year, including the enterprise-level intelligent agent development platform AgentArts, data intelligent agent DataArts, and others. 在昨天的华为中国合作伙伴大会 2026 上，华为高级副总裁、华为云 CEO 周跃峰透露，华为云今年将推出更多行业智能体，包括企业级智能体开发平台 AgentArts、数据智能体 DataArts 等。

It is expected that a series of "Lobsters" will be released in the second half of the year based on the AgentArts intelligent agent development platform, covering areas such as office, code, and marketing. 预计在下半年基于 AgentArts 智能体开发平台发布一系列「龙虾」，涉及办公、代码、营销等领域。

item.title: 字节跳动以超 60 亿美元出售沐瞳科技
item.guid: 字节跳动以超-60-亿美元出售沐瞳科技
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Saudi Savvy Games Group recently reached a final agreement with ByteDance to acquire all shares of Shanghai Moonton Technology (hereinafter referred to as "Moonton") for over US$6 billion. Both parties initiated negotiations in the second half of 2025, and core terms were agreed upon earlier this year. 据界面新闻报道，沙特 Savvy Games Group 近期已与字节跳动达成最终协议，以超 60 亿美元的价格收购上海沐瞳科技（下称「沐瞳」）全部股权。双方于 2025 年下半年启动谈判，核心条款于今年初达成共识。

The assets sold also include several games under development and related studios. Moonton was acquired by ByteDance in 2021. 此次出售资产还包括多款在研游戏及相关工作室。沐瞳于 2021 年被字节跳动收购。

Savvy is a gaming and esports industry investment and operation platform wholly owned by Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF), established in 2022, covering businesses such as game publishing and development, and esports events. Savvy 是沙特公共投资基金（PIF）于 2022 年全资设立的游戏与电竞产业投资及运营平台，覆盖游戏发行与研发、电竞赛事等业务。

After the transaction news was confirmed, Moonton CEO Zhang Yunfan sent an internal letter to all employees yesterday. The letter stated that after the transaction, Moonton will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Savvy, but the management structure will remain unchanged, the company headquarters will still be in Shanghai, and Zhang Yunfan himself will continue to serve as CEO. 交易消息确认后，沐瞳 CEO 张云帆昨日向全员发出内部信。信中表示，交易完成后沐瞳将成为 Savvy 的全资子公司，但管理结构保持不变，公司总部仍位于上海，张云帆本人也将继续担任 CEO 一职。

He also mentioned in the letter that based on historical performance contributions, ByteDance will provide multiple incentive plans for Moonton employees, including accelerating the vesting and distribution of some historically granted long-term incentives, and will launch new incentive schemes based on future performance. 他在信中还提到，基于历史业绩贡献，字节将为沐瞳员工提供多项激励计划，包括加速部分历史授予的长期激励的归属和发放，并将基于未来业绩推出新的激励方案。

item.title: 小鹏汽车首迎单季盈利，全年交付量翻倍
item.guid: 小鹏汽车首迎单季盈利，全年交付量翻倍
item.description:
Yesterday, XPeng Motors released its financial report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. 昨天，小鹏汽车发布 2025 年第四季度及全年财报。

  • Total deliveries for the full year 2025 reached 429,445 units, a year-on-year increase of 125.9%; 2025 年全年总交付量达 429445 台，同比增长 125.9%；
  • Full-year total revenue was 76.72 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 87.7%, with both figures reaching historical highs. 全年总营收为 767.2 亿元，同比增长 87.7%，两项数据均创历史新高。

Fourth Quarter: 第四季度：

  • In terms of gross margin, Q4 reached 21.3%, a year-on-year increase of 6.9 percentage points, and for the first time achieved a single-quarter net profit of 380 million yuan; 毛利率方面，Q4 达到 21.3%，同比提升 6.9 个百分点，并 首次实现单季净利润 3.8 亿元；
  • Single-quarter deliveries were 116,249 units, a year-on-year increase of 27.0%; 单季交付量为 116,249 台，同比增长 27.0%；
  • Single-quarter revenue was 22.25 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 38.2%, and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 9.2%; 单季营收 222.5 亿元，同比增长 38.2%，环比增长 9.2%；

    • The gross profit margin for the full year 2025 was 18.9%, an increase of 4.6 percentage points year-on-year;

    As of December 31, 2025, the company's cash and cash equivalents, restricted cash, short-term investments, and time deposits totaled 47.66 billion yuan.

Regarding overseas expansion: 出海方面：

    Xpeng officially entered the New Zealand market in February this year, opening its first service centers in Auckland's North Shore and Christchurch;

    On February 18, the all-new G6 began pre-sales in the UK, with a starting price of £39,990 (approximately RMB 368,000);

    By the end of 2025, Xpeng had a total of 721 stores across the country, covering 255 cities, and operated 2,108 supercharging stations.

For Q1 this year, Xpeng expects total deliveries to be between 61,000 and 66,000 units, with total revenue between 12.20 billion and 13.28 billion yuan. 对于今年 Q1，小鹏预计总交付量介于 6.1 万至 6.6 万台，总营收介于 122.0 亿元至 132.8 亿元。

CEO He Xiaopeng stated: "I believe Xpeng Motors is at a historic turning point for physical AI applications. We must not only expand the global market share of AI cars, complete the leap from L2+ assisted driving to L4 autonomous driving, and bring the second-generation VLA overseas, but also achieve mass production of advanced humanoid robots." CEO 何小鹏表示：「我相信小鹏汽车正处在物理 AI 应用的历史性转折点，我们不仅要扩大 AI 汽车的全球市场份额，完成 L2+ 辅助驾驶向 L4 自动驾驶的跨越，让第二代 VLA 走向海外，还要实现高阶人形机器人的规模量产。」

item.title: 宇树科技将上市，拟募资 42 亿冲击「A 股人形机器人第一股」
item.guid: 宇树科技将上市，拟募资-42-亿冲击「A-股人形机器人第一股」
item.description:
Yesterday, the Shanghai Stock Exchange officially accepted Unitree Robotics' STAR Market IPO application, intending to raise 4.202 billion yuan and aiming to become the "first A-share humanoid robot stock." 昨天，上海证券交易所正式受理宇树科技的科创板 IPO 申请，拟募集资金 42.02 亿元，冲击「A 股人形机器人第一股」。

The prospectus disclosed that this public offering of new shares will be no less than 40.4464 million shares, and the raised funds will be invested in four major projects: intelligent robot model research and development, robot body research and development, new intelligent robot product development, and intelligent robot manufacturing base construction. The sponsor institution is CITIC Securities. 招股书披露，本次公开发行新股不低于 4044.64 万股，募集资金将投入四大项目：智能机器人模型研发、机器人本体研发、新型智能机器人产品开发，以及智能机器人制造基地建设。保荐机构为中信证券。

In terms of financial data, Unitree Robotics has achieved rapid growth in the past three years: 财务数据方面，宇树科技近三年实现高速增长：

    From 2023 to 2025, the company's operating revenues were approximately 159 million yuan, 392 million yuan, and 1.708 billion yuan, respectively, with a year-on-year increase of approximately 335% in 2025;

    Net profits were -11 million yuan, 95 million yuan, and 600 million yuan, respectively, with non-recurring net profit exceeding 600 million yuan;

    In 2025, the company's humanoid robot shipments exceeded 5,500 units (pure humanoid, excluding wheeled dual-arm robots), ranking first globally, and both quadruped robots and humanoid robots held the top global market share.

item.title: 腾讯 AI Lab 撤销，部分人员并入混元
item.guid: 腾讯-AI-Lab-撤销，部分人员并入混元
item.description:
According to Machine Heart, Tencent's TEG (Technology Engineering Group) underwent an organizational restructuring yesterday, with AI Lab officially being abolished. Jiang Jie, the former head of AI Lab, no longer holds that position, but his other management responsibilities remain unchanged. 据机器之心报道，腾讯 TEG 技术工程事业群昨天发生组织架构调整，AI Lab 正式被撤销。原 AI Lab 主任蒋杰不再担任该职务，但其他管理职责维持不变。

Following the adjustment, some former AI Lab personnel will be merged into the Hunyuan team, reporting to Yao Shunyu; the Industry-Academia-Research Cooperation Center will be retained; and the head of the Multimodal Department will report directly to TEG President Lu Shan. 调整后，原 AI Lab 部分人员将并入混元团队，向姚顺雨汇报；产学研合作中心予以保留；多模态部负责人则直接向 TEG 总裁卢山汇报。

Yao Shunyu joined Tencent in December last year as the Chief AI Scientist for the "CEO / President's Office," reporting directly to Tencent President Martin Lau. He was only 27 years old at the time and was previously an OpenAI researcher. 姚顺雨于去年 12 月以「CEO / 总裁办公室」首席 AI 科学家身份加入腾讯，直接向腾讯总裁刘炽平汇报，彼时年仅 27 岁，此前为 OpenAI 研究员。

The report also mentioned that DeepSeek has recently experienced personnel changes, with Guo Daya, a core member who was deeply involved in major projects such as DeepSeekMath, DeepSeek-V3, and DeepSeek-R1, having resigned. 报道还提到，DeepSeek 近期同样存在人员变动，曾深度参与 DeepSeekMath、DeepSeek-V3、DeepSeek-R1 等重大项目的核心成员郭达雅已离职。

item.title: 腾讯元宝换 Logo，长出了眼睛
item.guid: 腾讯元宝换-Logo，长出了眼睛
item.description: Yesterday, Tencent Yuanbao officially announced a logo change. The new version incorporates eye elements based on the original design, making the overall style more anthropomorphic. Yuanbao stated that the new image aims to accompany users with a "more lively and dynamic posture" and will continue to refine its brand visuals and product capabilities. 昨天，腾讯元宝官宣更换 Logo，新版在原有设计基础上加入了眼睛元素，整体风格更为拟人化。元宝表示，全新形象旨在以「更活泼灵动的姿态」陪伴用户，并称将持续打磨品牌视觉与产品能力。

item.title: 曝 OpenAI 将推出「超级 App」：整合 ChatGPT、Codex 与 Atlas 浏览器
item.guid: 曝-OpenAI-将推出「超级-App」：整合-ChatGPT、Codex-与-Atlas-浏览器
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI plans to integrate its ChatGPT application, AI programming platform Codex, and AI browser Atlas into a single desktop "super app" to simplify user experience and concentrate resources. 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 计划将旗下 ChatGPT 应用、AI 编程平台 Codex 以及 AI 浏览器 Atlas 整合为一款桌面端「超级 App」，以简化用户体验、集中资源投入。

OpenAI's Head of Consumer Product, Fidji Simo, stated in an internal memo sent to employees yesterday: 'We realize that our energy is spread across too many applications and tech stacks, and we need to streamline. This fragmentation has been slowing us down and making it harder to achieve the quality standards we desire.' OpenAI 应用业务 CEO Fidji Simo 在昨天发给员工的内部备忘录中表示：「我们意识到，我们的精力分散在太多应用和技术栈上，需要精简。这种碎片化一直在拖慢我们的节奏，也让我们更难达到想要的质量标准。」

OpenAI President Greg Brockman will temporarily lead this product integration and related organizational restructuring, while Simo will lead the sales team in promoting new products to the market. OpenAI 总裁 Greg Brockman 将临时主导此次产品整合与相关组织架构调整，Simo 则将带领销售团队推进新产品的市场推广工作。

On the integration roadmap, OpenAI plans to first expand the capabilities of the Codex application to cover productivity tasks beyond programming, and then gradually merge ChatGPT and the Atlas browser into this super app. The mobile ChatGPT app is not affected by this adjustment. 在整合路线图上，OpenAI 计划率先扩展 Codex 应用的能力，使其覆盖编程以外的生产力任务，再逐步将 ChatGPT 与 Atlas 浏览器并入这一超级应用。 移动端 ChatGPT 应用不受此次调整影响。

item.title: Claude Code 上线 Channels：手机发消息就能直接操控
item.guid: Claude-Code-上线-Channels：手机发消息就能直接操控
item.description:
Yesterday, Claude Code quietly launched a preview version of its Channels feature. 昨天，Claude Code 低调上线了 Channels 功能的预览版。

Users can push external messages directly to a locally running Claude Code session via instant messaging platforms like Telegram and Discord, enabling remote command execution, progress queries, and result reception, with an overall experience similar to 'Lobster' OpenClaw. 用户通过 Telegram、Discord 等即时通讯平台，将外部消息直接推送到本地正在运行的 Claude Code 会话中，实现远程下达指令、查询进度和接收结果，整体体验与「龙虾」OpenClaw 类似。

Currently, Channels is still in the research preview phase and requires several conditions to be met: Claude Code version must be v2.1.80 or higher, login must be via a claude.ai account (API Key method is not supported); it also relies on Bun to run plugin scripts. 目前，Channels 仍处于研究预览阶段，需满足多个使用条件：Claude Code 版本需为 v2.1.80 及以上，必须使用 claude.ai 账号登录，不支持 API Key 方式；同时依赖 Bun 运行插件脚本。

Regarding security mechanisms, Channels employs a pairing and whitelist strategy. Users must first obtain a one-time pairing code via a Bot, then confirm authorization in the Claude Code session. After successful authorization, only allowed accounts can push messages to the session. 在安全机制上，Channels 采用配对与白名单策略。用户需先通过 Bot 获取一次性配对码，再在 Claude Code 会话中确认授权，成功后仅被允许的账号才能向会话推送消息。

Functionally, Channels supports attachment transfer and status feedback. Telegram supports individual files up to 50 MB, while Discord supports up to 10 files, each 25 MB. 功能层面，Channels 支持附件传输与状态反馈。Telegram 单个文件最大支持 50 MB，Discord 支持最多 10 个文件、每个 25 MB。

item.title: Perplexity 推出健康功能，可接入 Apple Health
item.guid: Perplexity-推出健康功能，可接入-Apple-Health
item.description:
Yesterday, AI search company Perplexity officially announced the launch of Perplexity Health, which integrates health information scattered across various platforms into a single entry point and uses AI to provide personalized health Q&A. 昨天，AI 搜索公司 Perplexity 正式宣布推出 Perplexity Health，可将分散于各类平台的健康信息整合至同一入口，并借助 AI 实现个性化健康问答。

Perplexity Health currently supports integration with Apple Health, electronic health records covering over 1.7 million healthcare providers, and multiple health platforms such as Fitbit, Ultrahuman, and Withings, with technical support provided by partners like b.well and Terra API. Perplexity Health 目前已支持接入苹果 Apple Health、覆盖逾 170 万家医疗服务提供商的电子健康记录，以及 Fitbit、Ultrahuman、Withings 等多个健康平台，背后由 b.well 和 Terra API 等合作伙伴提供技术支持。

Users can track long-term trends in biomarkers and exercise data through a personalized dashboard, and simultaneously access medical records, laboratory test results, and wearable device data when asking questions. 用户可通过个性化仪表盘追踪生物标志物与运动数据的长期趋势，并在提问时同时调用医疗记录、实验室检测结果与可穿戴设备数据。

Regarding data security, Perplexity states that all health data undergoes in-transit and static encryption, with strict access control mechanisms in place, and users can manage or delete relevant information at any time. Health data will not be used to train AI models, nor will it be sold to third parties. 在数据安全方面，Perplexity 表示所有健康数据均经过传输中与静态加密处理，设有严格的访问控制机制，用户可随时管理或删除相关信息。健康数据不会被用于训练 AI 模型，也不会出售给第三方。

item.title: 马克·库班：人形机器人最多活 10 年，未来是「人机协同设计」
item.guid: 马克·库班：人形机器人最多活-10-年，未来是「人机协同设计」
item.description:
According to Business Insider, American serial entrepreneur and investor Mark Cuban stated yesterday on the tech live show TBPN that he believes the humanoid robot path currently being pursued by major companies will end in failure, with a maximum lifespan of only 5 to 10 years. 据《商业内幕》报道，美国著名连续创业者、投资人马克·库班（Mark Cuban）昨天在科技直播节目 TBPN 上表示，他认为当前各大公司争相推进的人形机器人路线将以失败告终，最多只有 5 到 10 年的生命周期。

Cuban's core argument is: instead of having robots imitate human forms to adapt to existing living spaces, it's better to fundamentally redesign both spaces and robots, allowing them to co-evolve. 库班的核心观点是：与其让机器人模仿人类形态去适应现有的生活空间，不如从根本上重新设计空间与机器人，让两者协同进化。

I've heard people say, 'A house is a house (designed for humans), so humanoid robots are needed,' but I believe the house itself will also be completely redesigned.

In his envisioned future scenario, home spaces will be restructured around the robots' operational logic – functional areas like storage rooms, refrigerators, and washing machines will be hidden, exclusively for robots of various forms (e.g., spider-like or ant-like) to operate, while human living areas will exist independently. 在他设想的未来场景中，家居空间将围绕机器人的工作逻辑重构——储藏室、冰箱、洗衣机等功能区域被隐藏起来，专供形态各异的机器人（例如类蜘蛛或蚂蚁形态）操作，而人类的生活区域则独立存在。

Robots won't be fully humanoid; they will be in their optimal form. You design houses for robots, and you design robots for houses.

He also cited Amazon's warehouse robot system as an example – Amazon currently has over 1 million robots for sorting and handling, none of which have a humanoid appearance. 他还举了亚马逊的仓储机器人体系作为例子——亚马逊目前拥有超过 100 万台用于分拣、搬运的机器人，没有一台具备人形外观。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：科技巨头不应向公众散布 AI 恐慌
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：科技巨头不应向公众散布-AI-恐慌
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated yesterday during a discussion at the company's tech conference that the tech industry should exercise restraint when introducing the risks of artificial intelligence to the public. 据彭博社报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋昨天在公司技术大会的一场讨论中表示，科技行业在向公众介绍人工智能风险时应保持克制。

Warnings are good, but intimidation is not, because this technology (AI) is too important to us.

He believes that the biggest national security risk surrounding artificial intelligence is not the technology itself, but the public hindering its adoption due to fear, anger, or distrust. 他认为，围绕人工智能的最大国家安全风险，并非技术本身，而是公众因恐惧、愤怒或不信任而阻碍技术落地。

He emphasized that AI is not a "biological entity, alien entity, or conscious being," but rather computer software, and unsubstantiated catastrophic narratives could lead to negative consequences. 他强调，人工智能并非「生物体、外星体或具备意识的存在」，而是计算机软件，缺乏证据的灾难化表述可能带来负面后果。

As one of NVIDIA's key clients, Anthropic recently clashed with the Trump administration over its insistence on contractually limiting its AI products from being used for domestic surveillance and fully autonomous weapons. Last month, the U.S. government sought to exclude Anthropic from government cooperation projects, citing "supply chain risks". 作为英伟达的重要客户之一，Anthropic 近期因坚持在合同中限制其 AI 产品用于国内监控和全自动武器，与特朗普政府发生冲突。上个月，美国政府以「供应链风险」为由，希望将 Anthropic 排除在政府合作项目之外。

Despite the controversy, Jensen Huang remains optimistic about Anthropic's business prospects, stating that its revenue could exceed $1 trillion by 2030, and believes its CEO's growth projections are relatively conservative. 尽管存在争议，黄仁勋仍对 Anthropic 的商业前景表示乐观，称其收入规模在 2030 年前有望突破 1 万亿美元，并认为其 CEO 对增长预测相对保守。

item.title: 任天堂 Switch 2 或推新版本，支持可更换电池
item.guid: 任天堂-Switch-2-或推新版本，支持可更换电池
item.description:
According to Nikkei, Nintendo is reportedly considering launching a new version of the Switch 2 with replaceable batteries for the European market. 据日经报道，任天堂正考虑为欧洲市场推出支持更换电池的 Switch 2 新版本。

This news is plausible not only because Europe is increasingly prioritizing "repairability," but also because the current Switch 2 itself is difficult to repair. 这个消息之所以成立，不只是因为欧洲对「可维修」越来越重视，更因为现款 Switch 2 本身就不好修。

After a teardown last year, iFixit gave it a repairability score of only 3/10, specifically citing issues such as the battery still being glued in place and multiple key components soldered to the motherboard. iFixit 去年拆机后给它的可维修性评分只有 3/10，点名的问题就包括电池仍是胶粘固定、多个关键部件焊死在主板上。

The real driving force behind Nintendo's move is the EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. The EU requires that from 2027, portable batteries in consumer electronics should be more easily removable and replaceable by end-users, which may directly rewrite hardware design rules. 而任天堂此举背后的真正推手，是欧盟《电池法规》Regulation (EU) 2023/1542。欧盟要求，从 2027 年起，消费电子里的便携式电池应能被终端用户更容易拆卸和更换，这或许会直接改写硬件设计规则。

It's not just Nintendo; many consumer electronics giants are preparing for the future, and even Apple has been laying the groundwork for a while. 不止任天堂，许多消费电子巨头都在未雨绸缪，就连苹果也早就在做铺垫。

In 2021, Apple announced Self Service Repair, beginning to offer genuine parts, tools, and repair manuals to users; in 2024, Apple further announced support for using used genuine parts in some iPhone repairs. 2021 年，苹果宣布 Self Service Repair，开始向用户开放原厂零件、工具和维修手册；2024 年，苹果又宣布支持在部分 iPhone 维修中使用二手原厂件。

In recent years, Apple's new products have also shown significant improvements in repairability, with the latest MacBook Neo being rated by iFixit as the easiest Apple product to repair in recent years. 近几年，苹果的新产品在可维修度方面也有显著改进，最新的 MacBook Neo 就被 iFixit 评为近年最好修的苹果产品。

item.title: 爱马仕推出 3.5 万元无线充电器，不送充电头
item.guid: 爱马仕推出-3.5-万元无线充电器，不送充电头
item.description:
According to The Verge, French luxury brand Hermès recently launched a series of MagSafe-compatible wireless charging accessories wrapped in calfskin, with prices reaching up to $5,150 (over 35,000 RMB), more than three times the starting price of a 14-inch MacBook Pro. 据 The Verge 报道，法国奢侈品牌爱马仕（Hermès）近日推出了一系列以小牛皮包裹的 MagSafe 兼容无线充电配件，最高售价达 5150 美元（超过 3.5 万元人民币），超过 14 英寸 MacBook Pro 起售价的三倍。

The new product series is named "Paddock" and includes three independent chargers. The entry-level Paddock Solo is priced at $1,250, serving as a single-device magnetic wireless charger; both Paddock Yoyo and Paddock Duo are priced at $1,750, supporting simultaneous charging for Apple Watch and iPhone. 此次新品系列名为「Paddock」，共包含三款独立充电器。入门款 Paddock Solo 售价 1250 美元，为单设备磁吸无线充电器；Paddock Yoyo 和 Paddock Duo 均售价 1750 美元，支持同时为 Apple Watch 与 iPhone 充电。

All three chargers are meticulously wrapped in Hermès' iconic golden Swift calfskin, featuring saddle stitching, and have the brand's "H" logo printed at the magnetic charging position for alignment. 三款充电器均以爱马仕标志性的金色 Swift 小牛皮精心包裹，配以马鞍针法缝线，并在磁吸充电位置印有品牌「H」标识用于对齐定位。

It's worth noting that despite the hefty price tag, Hermès does not include a power adapter with the product—all chargers require a 20W or higher USB-C adapter, and the only included accessory is a 1-meter USB-C cable. 值得注意的是，尽管售价不菲，爱马仕并未随产品附赠电源适配器——所有充电器均需搭配 20W 或更高功率的 USB-C 适配器使用，随附配件仅有一根长约 1 米的 USB-C 数据线。

item.title: 山姆回应无理由退货 30 天缩短到 7 天
item.guid: 山姆回应无理由退货-30-天缩短到-7-天
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Sam's Club recently released a draft update to its "Return Policy" for public comment, proposing to significantly shorten the no-questions-asked return period for online channels from 90 days to 7 days, sparking consumer concern and questioning. 据界面新闻报道，近日，山姆会员商店发布《退货政策》更新征求意见稿，拟将线上渠道无理由退货期限从 90 天大幅缩短至 7 天，引发消费者关注与质疑。

According to the draft, consumers who purchase goods through the Sam's Club App and SamsClub mini-program can enjoy "7-day no-questions-asked returns" from the date of receipt, provided the goods meet the intact standard. 根据意见稿，消费者通过山姆会员商店 App 及 SamsClub 小程序购买的商品，自收货之日起，若商品符合完好标准，可享受「7 天无理由退货」。

However, some consumers expressed concern that the current no-questions-asked return period on the Sam's Club platform is 90 days, and if this adjustment is implemented, whether the return window will be significantly shortened. 但有消费者表示担忧，目前山姆平台的无理由退货时限长达 90 天，此次调整若落地，退货窗口期是否将大幅缩短。

In response, Sam's Club issued successive replies on the evening of March 19th and March 20th, clarifying that this optimization of the return policy "does not involve an adjustment to the return period." The purpose of the adjustment is to clarify the applicable scenarios for online exchange requests and to add an after-sales service evaluation function to enhance service transparency and member experience. 对此，山姆方面于 3 月 19 日晚间及 3 月 20 日相继作出回应，澄清本次退货政策优化「并不涉及退货时效调整」，调整目的在于明确线上申请换货的适用情形，并新增售后处理评价功能，以提升服务透明度与会员体验。

A Sam's Club store employee also stated that the policy is currently in the public comment phase and is not a final conclusion. For general merchandise like dry goods and snacks that are unopened and do not affect secondary sales, 90 days remains the current longest after-sales period. 一家山姆门店工作人员亦表示，目前政策仍处于征求意见阶段，并非最终结论，针对干货、零食等未拆封、不影响二次销售的一般商品，90 天仍是当前最长售后时效。

item.title: 《阳光女子合唱团》定档 4 月 4 日
item.guid: 《阳光女子合唱团》定档-4-月-4-日
item.description:
The emotional film "Sunshine Women's Choir" officially announced its release date on April 4th. 情感电影《阳光女子合唱团》正式宣布定档 4 月 4 日。

The film, starring Ivy Chen, tells the story of Li Huizhen, a mother imprisoned, who forms a choir for her daughter, who is about to be separated from her, and how they heal each other. The highly contrasting setting of "raising a child in prison" becomes the film's greatest source of emotional tension. 影片由陈意涵领衔主演，讲述身陷囹圄的母亲李惠贞为即将被迫分离的女儿组建合唱团、彼此治愈的故事，「监狱里带娃」这一极具反差感的设定成为影片最大的情感张力来源。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜加州海底捞机器人「失控蹦迪」，3 名店员才把它拉住
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜加州海底捞机器人「失控蹦迪」，3-名店员才把它拉住
item.description:
According to NBC, recently, a humanoid robot originally responsible for performing dances at a Haidilao hotpot restaurant in Cupertino, California, suddenly "went wild dancing," scattering chopsticks, condiments, and other tableware, causing customers present to dodge. 据 NBC 报道，近日，美国加州库比蒂诺一家海底捞火锅门店一台原本负责表演舞蹈的人形机器人突然「失控蹦迪」，将筷子、调料等餐具甩得四散飞溅，在场顾客纷纷躲避。

Video footage showed the robot charging directly towards a dining table, frantically hitting the tabletop, and then overturning tableware and food. Staff members tried to stop it but couldn't hold it back. 视频画面显示，这台机器人径直冲向一张餐桌，开始疯狂拍打桌面，随后掀翻餐具和食物。店员们试图上前制止，却根本拉不住它。

In the end, it took three staff members to collectively pull the safety belt around the robot's neck to barely "drag it away from the scene" — while its feet were still tapping to the beat. 最终，足足动用了 3 名店员，合力拽住机器人脖子上的安全带，才勉强将其「拖离现场」——而它的脚还在不停地踩着节拍。

Regarding this "loss of control," Haidilao responded to NBC News, stating that the robot "did not malfunction or lose control," and all its movements were pre-programmed. 对于这次「失控」，海底捞方面回应 NBC News 称，该机器人「并未发生故障或失控」，其所有动作均为预先编程设定。

The store explained that the incident occurred because, at the customer's request, the robot was brought to a position "closer than usual" to the dining table, and the limited space affected its performance movements. 门店解释，事发原因是应顾客要求，机器人被带到了距餐桌「比平时更近」的位置，有限的空间影响了它的表演动作发挥。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《你好，爱美丽》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《你好，爱美丽》
item.description:
"Hello, Amélie" is co-directed by Mylène Valade and Han Liangchou, adapted from the semi-autobiographical novel "The Metaphysics of Tubes" by Belgian writer Amélie Nothomb, with content drawn from the author's real childhood experiences. 《你好，爱美丽》由迈利斯·瓦拉德与韩良畴联合执导，改编自比利时作家阿梅莉·诺冬的半自传体小说《管子的玄思》，内容取材自原作者的童年真实经历。

The story unfolds from the perspective of three-year-old Amélie, narrating her warm journey of perceiving the world, experiencing growth, and saying goodbye in a foreign land. 故事以三岁小女孩爱美丽的视角展开，讲述她在异国他乡感知世界、经历成长与告别的温暖历程。

The film has accumulated over 40 international award nominations, including a nomination for Best Animated Feature Film at the 98th Academy Awards, a nomination for the Caméra d'Or (Best First Feature Film) at the 78th Cannes Film Festival, and a nomination for Best Animated Feature Film in the Motion Picture category at the 83rd Golden Globe Awards. 影片已积累超过 40 项国际大奖提名，其中包括第 98 届奥斯卡金像奖最佳动画长片提名、第 78 届戛纳电影节金摄影机奖（导演首作奖）提名，以及第 83 届金球奖电影类最佳动画长片提名。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《地位游戏》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《地位游戏》
item.description:
"The Status Game: How Winners Are Chosen" is a work of organizational sociology written by Toby Stuart, a professor of management at the Haas School of Business, University of California, Berkeley, after more than 25 years of empirical research. 《地位游戏：人生赢家是如何被选中的》是加州大学伯克利分校哈斯商学院管理学教授托比·斯图尔特（Toby Stuart）历经逾 25 年实证研究后写就的组织社会学著作。

The book revolves around the core concept of "Anointment." Stuart defines it as: when high-status individuals or institutions publicly endorse someone or something, the value and opportunities of the endorsed party leap forward and continuously accumulate over time. 全书围绕「受膏机制」（Anointment）这一核心概念展开。斯图尔特将其定义为：当高地位的个人或机构公开认可某人或某事物时，被认可方的价值与机会随之跃迁，并在时间轴上持续累积。

    A portrait re-identified as an authentic Rembrandt, and a similar work by his most outstanding disciple that is almost indistinguishable, differ by several orders of magnitude in price;

    A scientific paper faces vastly different critical fates before and after its authorship is revealed.

Stuart calls this cognitive shortcut the "Big Shift" — when evaluating works, papers, or companies, people often shift their attention from "the quality of the thing itself" to "who it is associated with." 斯图尔特将这类认知捷径称为「大偏移」（Big Shift）——人们在评估作品、论文或公司时，往往将注意力从「事物本身的质量」转移至「它与谁相关」。

The profound consequence of this mechanism is what Stuart repeatedly emphasizes in his book as the "Matthew Effect": status begets more status, and initial small advantages, through cumulative effects, ultimately evolve into unshakeable structural disparities. 这一机制的深层后果，是斯图尔特在书中反复强调的「马太效应」（Matthew Effect）：地位催生更多地位，初始的微小优势经由累积效应，最终演变为难以撼动的结构性差距。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《双人成行》Steam 两折优惠
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《双人成行》Steam-两折优惠
item.description:
"It Takes Two" is an action-adventure co-op game developed by Swedish independent studio Hazelight Studios and published by EA. 《双人成行》（It Takes Two）是由瑞典独立工作室 Hazelight Studios 开发、EA 发行的动作冒险双人游戏。

The game's plot revolves around Cody and May, a couple whose relationship is broken and on the verge of divorce. Their daughter, Rose, unwilling to see her parents separate, sheds tears on handmade dolls, accidentally triggering a spell that traps their souls within the dolls. 游戏剧情围绕一对感情破裂、濒临离婚的夫妻科迪（Cody）与小梅（May）展开。女儿罗丝（Rose）因不舍父母分离，将泪水滴在亲手制作的玩偶上，意外触发魔咒，令两人的灵魂被困于玩偶之中。

Guided by Dr. Hakim, the "Book of Love," the two are forced to journey hand-in-hand through fantastical scenes like gardens, space, and air-conditioned nightclubs. As they overcome numerous obstacles, they gradually rekindle their feelings for each other, finally breaking the spell and returning to reality with a concert. 在「爱之书」哈金博士（Dr. Hakim）的引导下，二人被迫携手穿越花园、太空、空调夜店等奇幻场景，在化解重重障碍的过程中逐渐重拾彼此的感情，最终以一曲演唱会解除魔法、回归现实。

In terms of gameplay, "It Takes Two" is built around the core design philosophy of "mechanic diversity." Fares explicitly required the team to switch to new mechanics before the current gameplay became "boring," resulting in almost no repetitive design throughout the approximately 10-hour playthrough. 玩法层面，《双人成行》以「机制多样性」为核心设计理念。法尔斯明确要求团队在游戏玩法被「用腻」之前即切换至全新机制，使得整个约 10 小时的流程中几乎不存在重复设计。

After its release, this work received widespread critical acclaim from the industry. According to Metacritic, the PC version scored 89 points, the PS4/PS5 version 88 points, and the Xbox Series X version 89 points. IGN gave it a 9, calling it "incredibly creative" and comparing its gameplay density to games produced by Shigeru Miyamoto. 本作发布后获得业界广泛好评。据 Metacritic 汇总，PC 版评分为 89 分，PS4/PS5 版为 88 分，Xbox Series X 版为 89 分。IGN 给出 9 分，称其「创意奇佳」，并将其玩法密度与宫本茂出品的游戏相提并论。

The Steam platform also awarded it the "Better Together" annual award. As of October 2024, the game's cumulative global sales have exceeded 20 million copies, and the Steam page shows over 110,000 simplified Chinese reviews, with a 94% positive rating. Steam 平台亦授予其「独乐乐不如众乐乐」年度大奖。截至 2024 年 10 月，游戏全球累计销量已突破 2000 万份，Steam 页面显示简体中文评测逾 11 万篇，好评率达 94%。

Currently, until March 27th, "It Takes Two" is available on Steam at a 20% discount, priced at 39.60 yuan (original price 198 yuan). 目前至 3 月 27 日，《双人成行》在 Steam 平台两折优惠，售价 39.60 元（原价 198 元）。

早报
